story_intro: A famous author was found dead. You must deduce Who did it, with What weapon, and Where.
clues: Dr. Wichai is the only one with advanced knowledge of toxins.
Bloodstains and a missing kitchen tool were found near the stove.
Chef Pom hates the outdoors and refuses to use chemicals.
The person who used the Nylon Rope committed the crime in the Garden.
